positive: A stylized, high-contrast geometric representation of a serene forest landscape. Focus on strong, interlocking shapes that create a sense of depth and movement. The palette should be dominated by deep forest greens, earthy terracotta, and accents of metallic gold leaf accents. Incorporate minimal, abstract fauna outlines (like stylized birds or deer silhouettes) seamlessly integrated into the foliage patterns. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, designed as a repeating, art-deco inspired textile print. Use crisp, clean lines and a strong, impactful silhouette style. Studio quality vector illustration, perfect for apparel printing, flat color blocks, clean background.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, poor composition, bad anatomy, noisy, messy, realism, photograph, low detail, gradient
